landing.heroSub: Decision Replay saves how you were thinking when you made a decision, then brings it back when you know how it turned out.
landing.trust3: Your data stays on your device
landing.step1Desc: Write what you think, what you expect, how sure you are. It gets locked.
landing.step2Desc: When the outcome shows up, the app calls you back.
landing.step3Desc: Over time, you discover how you actually decide — and what you can change.
landing.profileProfDesc: Work decisions: suppliers, projects, teams, strategic moves.
landing.profileStudentDesc: Decisions about studying, school, assignments, activities, goals.
landing.profilePersonalDesc: Big life decisions: job change, purchases, turning points.

onboarding.step1Title: Tell us how you'll use it
onboarding.changeLater: You can change this anytime in Settings.
onboarding.step2Title3: You come back when the outcome shows up.

dashboard.calibrationSub: Comparing your stated confidence with actual outcomes.
dashboard.calibrationNoData: At least 5 replays are needed for a safe conclusion.
dashboard.emptyDesc: Start with your first, or see how it works with a demo.

wizard.step1Title: What kind of decision is this?
wizard.step1Sub: Pick a template or start blank.
wizard.step2Sub: What you write here will be locked. You can't change it later.
wizard.step3Title: What do you expect to happen?
wizard.step3Sub: These are the points we'll check at replay time.
wizard.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Choosing a new tool for the team
wizard.success: How will you know it worked?
wizard.secondOpinion: Did you get a second opinion?
wizard.replayWhen: When do you want to review this?
wizard.lockConfirmBody: You won't be able to change what you thought right now. You'll only be able to add notes later.
wizard.chooseAtLeast: You need a title to continue.

detail.deleteConfirm: This will be deleted permanently. It can't be undone.
detail.challengeDesc: Send this link to someone. They'll see the question, make their own prediction, and then both answers will be revealed.
detail.reminderDesc: Add a calendar event so you remember to do your replay.

replay.title: Replay — {{title}}
replay.outcomeRating: How would you rate the outcome?
replay.wouldRepeat: With what you knew then, would you make the same decision?
replay.whatChange: What would you change, if anything?

comparison.title: Comparison
comparison.observationOveroptimistic: You state higher confidence than gets confirmed. Being slightly more conservative may help.
comparison.lessonTitle: One thing I take from this
comparison.lessonPlaceholder: e.g. Next time I'll ask the team's opinion before deciding.

settings.title: Settings
settings.restoreQuestion: {{count}} decisions will be imported. Replace existing?
settings.corruptFile: This file isn't a valid Decision Replay backup.
settings.deleteAllConfirm: All your decisions will be deleted. Download a backup first?

about.title: What Decision Replay is
about.p1: A tool that helps you learn from your own decisions. It records how you were thinking when you made a decision and returns when you know how it turned out.
about.p2: It doesn't tell you what to do. It doesn't grade you. It just shows you your own patterns over time.
about.isNot1: It isn't a decision coach or advisor.
about.isNot2: It isn't a tool for medical, legal or financial decisions.
about.isNot3: It doesn't use AI to guess outcomes.
about.isNot4: It doesn't collect anything from you.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.summary: Decision Replay collects nothing. Your decisions are stored only in your device's browser.
privacy.detail1: We don't send data to a server.
privacy.detail2: We don't use cookies or trackers.
privacy.detail4: If you clear your browser data, decisions will be lost — so keep a backup.
privacy.detail5: The code is open source (MIT license).
privacy.sensitive: Don't write names, health info or sensitive details. Use general descriptions.

sensitiveWarning: Better not to write names, health info or sensitive details. Use general descriptions if unsure.

professional-general.name: General work decision
professional-general.desc: Flexible template for any decision at work.

professional-time.name: Project time estimate
professional-time.desc: How long will it take? What's the critical path?

student-study.name: Study method
student-study.desc: Which study method to try for an exam.

personal-job.name: Job change
personal-job.desc: One of the biggest decisions you can make.

personal-purchase.name: Big purchase
personal-purchase.desc: For purchases you'd like to evaluate later.

challenge.invalidDesc: This challenge link is invalid or has expired.
challenge.title: Challenge
challenge.yourPrediction: What do you think will happen?
challenge.ctaDesc: Want to track your own decisions?

insights.title: Insight
insights.calibrated: Well calibrated! Your confidence matches your outcomes.
insights.overconfident: You overestimate yourself by {{gap}}%. Try being slightly more conservative.
insights.underconfident: You underestimate yourself by {{gap}}%! Trust your decisions more.

share.title: Share
share.tweet: I was {{confidence}}% sure about "{{title}}". See what actually happened.
